failedAssertions.reason: API response time ~1.6s (exceeds 500ms threshold). FTS queries themselves take ~3.5ms, but the /api/search endpoint bundles semantic search (sentence-transformers + FAISS inference ~1.5s) into every request with no parameter to skip it. Fix: add a `type=fts` parameter or run semantic search asynchronously.

appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance sections for browser and curl surfaces, known frictions (SPA click handling, bundled search timing, LLM latency), and concurrency configuration
Added SPA click workaround, bundled search timing, and LLM first-token latency notes from flow report frictions
